title: pricing_rules
description: Per-SKU, per-tier pricing. Each row is a single price point. Non-null 'rule' is a math.js expression that must evaluate truthy for this price to apply (e.g. quantity-break: 'qty >= 40'). Null rule = always applies for legacy rows. Quantity break rows are sorted by priority so the highest applicable min-quantity rule wins.

sku.description: SKU this price applies to. Must match a product_components.sku in the same org.

rule.description: Optional math.js expression. Null = always applies for legacy rows. Variable 'qty' is available. Example: 'qty >= 40' for a quantity-break row.

price.description: Per-unit price ex-GST in AUD. Use 0 for SKUs where pricing is TBC — engine will emit unitPrice=0 with a warning.

priority.description: Lower = tried first. Quantity-break rows usually have higher priority than the always-applies row.

canonical_code.description: Stable canonical identifier mapped to this pricing rule.
